records.question: Which things of type_of_thing_code 'Commen' with service_details exactly 'Satisfied' that have related customer_events, timed_status_of_things, and timed_locations_of_things records also have a timed_locations_of_things record dated exactly '2016-12-29 00:39:19'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE things.type_of_thing_code = 'Commen' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-12-29 00:39:19' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 JOIN Customer_Events AS T2 ON T1.thing_id = T2.thing_id JOIN Timed_Status_of_Things AS T3 ON T1.thing_id = T3.thing_id JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things AS T4 ON T1.thing_id = T4.thing_id WHERE T1.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'Commen' AND T1.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND T4.Date_and_Time = '2016-12-29 00:39:19'

records.question: Which electronics have a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied on 2016-08-04 00:25:55 at location 94425 Nellie Kn, associated with Denesik and Sons Party?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_locations_of_things.location_code = '94425 Nellie Kn' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 INNER JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things AS T2 ON T1.thing_id = T2.thing_id INNER JOIN Organizations AS T3 ON T1.organization_id = T3.organization_id WHERE T1.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'electronics' AND T1.service_type_code = 'Check' AND T1.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND T2.Date_and_Time = '2016-08-04 00:25:55' AND T2.Location_Code = '94425 Nellie Kn' AND T3.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'

records.question: Which things with a service type of Check and service details exactly Satisfied are associated with Denesik and Sons Party, where their services are Moving Out and also exactly Satisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE services.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND services.service_type_code = 'Moving Out' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 INNER JOIN Organizations AS T2 ON T1.organization_id = T2.organization_id WHERE T1.service_type_code = 'Check' AND T1.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND T2.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND EXISTS (
  SELECT
    1
  FROM Services AS T3
  WHERE
    T3.organization_id = T2.organization_id AND T3.service_type_code = 'Moving Out' AND T3.service_details = 'Satisfied'
)

records.question: What things with service type Check and service details Unsatisfied are linked to Reinger, Hudson and Nolan Group, have a status of In Progress exactly on 2016-11-24 12:44:00, and were located on or before 2017-03-19 13:57:49?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN customer_events ON things.thing_id = customer_events.thing_id
JOIN timed_status_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_status_of_things.thing_id
JOIN timed_locations_of_things ON things.thing_id = timed_locations_of_things.thing_id
WHERE timed_status_of_things.date_and_date = '2016-11-24 12:44:00' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Reinger, Hudson and Nolan Group' AND timed_status_of_things.status_of_thing_code = 'In Progress' AND timed_locations_of_things.date_and_time <= '2017-03-19 13:57:49' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND things.service_details = 'Unsatisfied'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.thing_id FROM Things AS T1 JOIN Organizations AS T2 ON T1.organization_id = T2.organization_id JOIN Timed_Status_of_Things AS T3 ON T1.thing_id = T3.thing_id JOIN Timed_Locations_of_Things AS T4 ON T1.thing_id = T4.thing_id WHERE T1.service_type_code = 'Check' AND T1.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND T2.organization_details = 'Reinger, Hudson and Nolan Group' AND T3.Status_of_Thing_Code = 'In Progress' AND T3.Date_and_Date = '2016-11-24 12:44:00' AND T4.Date_and_Time <= '2017-03-19 13:57:49'

records.question: Which electronics from Denesik and Sons Party have a service check marked as satisfied while their pay bills service is unsatisfied?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT things.thing_id FROM things
JOIN organizations ON things.organization_id = organizations.organization_id
JOIN services ON organizations.organization_id = services.organization_id
WHERE things.service_details = 'Satisfied' AND things.service_type_code = 'Check' AND services.service_details = 'Unsatisfied' AND services.service_type_code = 'Pay bills' AND things.type_of_thing_code = 'Electronics' AND organizations.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.thing_id
FROM Things AS T1
INNER JOIN Organizations AS T2
  ON T1.organization_id = T2.organization_id
WHERE
  T1.Type_of_Thing_Code = 'electronics' AND T2.organization_details = 'Denesik and Sons Party' AND EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM Timed_Status_of_Things AS T3
    WHERE
      T3.thing_id = T1.thing_id AND T3.Status_of_Thing_Code = 'service check satisfied'
  ) AND EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM Timed_Status_of_Things AS T4
    WHERE
      T4.thing_id = T1.thing_id AND T4.Status_of_Thing_Code = 'pay bills unsatisfied'
  )
